title: pogonospermum rigidum
intro: Pogonospermum rigidum, commonly known as the button bush, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which contain compounds like limonene and beta-pinene, providing anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pogonospermum rigidum include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
